name: nxscript
description: NxScript - A comprehensive suite of scripting languages for Haxe: Nx-Script (bytecode VM), Nz-Dialogue (interactive conversations), and Nz-Cinematic (cutscenes)
releasenote: Complete rewrite: Added Nz-Script bytecode language with hex opcodes, stack-based VM, functions, lambdas, arrays, dictionaries, and full debugging support
